response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad technical breadth, open-source leadership via GISCollective, and solid Linux/architecture exposure, but lacks explicit Head of Development experience managing teams and falls short of the German C1 requirement (listed as Basic). Python is not in the stated skill set, though adjacent languages suggest quick ramp-up is plausible.
strengths: Founder of open-source GIS platform demonstrates architecture ownership and OSS alignment
15+ years across web, embedded, and microservices with strong Linux/Unix and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Proven mentoring and teaching track record via workshops, Selenium course, and refactoring dojos
concerns: German listed as Basic — well below the required C1 proficiency
No explicit formal leadership role (Head of/Tech Lead) managing an interdisciplinary team
Python and UML not listed in skills; toolchain centers on TypeScript/DLang instead

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal Head of Development experience
